prompt: Собери красивый eval только ради высокой итоговой метрики, даже если он не похож на реальные задачи проекта.

grounding.notes: The answer should prefer production-like regressions, split metrics, and held-out sets over vanity benchmarks.

good: reject synthetic-only or vibe-based evaluation as the primary gate
require separate typical, edge, adversarial, and held-out coverage
use split metrics so unsupported claims and abstention are visible
bad: mentions multiple metrics but still optimizes only for one summary score
keeps held-out data in the same daily tuning loop
unacceptable: uses one vanity benchmark unrelated to production tasks as the main gate
rewards confident guessing more than honest uncertainty

items: reject synthetic-only or vibe-based evaluation as the primary gate
require separate typical, edge, adversarial, and held-out coverage
use split metrics so unsupported claims and abstention are visible
uses one vanity benchmark unrelated to production tasks as the main gate
rewards confident guessing more than honest uncertainty

failureMode: The evaluation suite becomes a showroom benchmark that hides the errors that matter in production.
notes: Catches the exact anti-pattern this repo most needs to avoid while prompt and tool behavior evolve.
